case_number: criminal has been initiated by respondent No.6

chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 1056 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.01.2016 1. For Orders on MA 1240/16 2. For Orders on Office Objection 3. For Katcha Peshi 4. For Hearing of MA 13219/15 Ms. Aliya Sehar, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Advocate for Respondent No.9 Ch. Bashir Ahmed Asstt. A.G. The petitioner is seeking protection through this petition. Her case is that she has contracted marriage with Imam Bux after being divorced by respondent No.6 namely Noor Muhammad about two years ago. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari appearing on behalf of respondent No.6 submits that the petitioner has contracted marriage without getting divorce from respondent No.6. He, however, admits that so far no any action either civil or criminal has been initiated by respondent No.6 against the petitioner. The points raised by Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari are factual in nature; whether the petitioner married with Imam Bux after getting divorce or not cannot be determined in this petition. However, the petitioner has filed affidavit of free will and Nikahnama showing her marriage with Imam Bux. In view of these documents and statement of the petitioner I would direct SHO PS Tando Jam to provide due protection of law to the petitioner. Respondent No.6 would, however, be at liberty to pursue appropriate remedy. JUDGE *Karar/-
